title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-28
body:
The moderation team has completed a review of the abuse queue. Here is a summary of actions taken:

**Bans (2)**
- spam_wave_42 — Banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes. Zero tolerance for malicious content.
- toxic_runner — Banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

**Warnings (1)**
- bot_like_user_77 — Warned for repeated near-identical automated-looking replies in help channels. Continued behaviour may result in further action.

**No action taken (3)**
- trusted_helper (report_003) — Report stemmed from a single-user moderation dispute; no policy violation found.
- new_member_17 (report_004) — Low-severity formatting issue; no sanction warranted.
- core_maintainer (report_006) — Confirmed false positive; report was the result of coordinated brigading following a legitimate moderation decision.

All 6 reports have been closed. We remain committed to keeping this community safe and welcoming. If you have concerns, please use the official report channels.
